results.rendered_html:
haridrā [hariṃ pītavarṇaṃ dravati dru-gatau-ḍa]
1 Turmeric.
2 The root of turmeric powdered; see  Malli.  on
(pb)  N. 22. 49. 
Comp.
— āna a. of a yellow colour.
— (bhaḥ)
1 the yellow colour.
2 Zedoary.
— gaṇapatiḥ, -gaṇeśaḥ a particular form of the god Gaṇeśa.
— rāga, -rāgaka a.
1 turmeric-coloured.
2 unsteady in attachment or affection, fickle-minded (as a lover); (thus defined by Halāyudha: -kṣaṇamātrānurāgaśca haridrārāga ucyate).
